description_templates.small_pack:
A set of {count} hand-crafted pixel art sprites in the Kairosoft management sim style. Each sprite has been quality-checked against the 0x72 Dungeon Tileset standard with curated retro palettes.

**Includes:**
- {count} unique sprites (16×16)
- Transparent PNG files
- Game-ready pixel art
- CC0 license — use in any project
description_templates.tile_set:
A complete {theme} pixel art tileset for your RPG or simulation game. Built in the Kairosoft management sim style with quality-checked pixel art.

**Includes:**
- {count} tiles (16×16)
- Seamless tile sheets
- Game-ready format
- CC0 license
description_templates.pico8_small_pack:
A set of {count} hand-crafted PICO-8 palette pixel art sprites in a comfy {theme} style. Each sprite uses the authentic PICO-8 retro palette with clean 1px outlines on transparent backgrounds.

**Includes:**
- {count} unique sprites (32x32)
- Transparent PNG files
- Full sprite sheet strip
- CC0 license — use in any project
